title: Trigger
body:
Hello there, this is my first mod ever, i hope you enjoy

Bugs/Community: https://discord.gg/rCBPJwgWpD

Trigger mod includes:

Biomes:

Inverted Hills
Strange Plains
Force

Blocks:

Algee Log
Algee leaves
Aglee Planks
Ruby Ore
Block of Ruby
Compresser (can only be used with milk)
Tomato Fern

Items:

Ruby
Potion of Spice
Splash pot of Spice
Linger pot of Spice
Spice Arrow
Pepperoni
Cheese
Pizza
Ruby Knife
Duck Spawn egg
Tomato
Tomato Sauce

Mobs:

Ducks
